title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page | User has a valid OrangeHRM account
test_steps: Enter valid username: Admin | Enter valid password: admin123 | Click the Login button
expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard. URL contains /dashboard. User name is visible in the top navigation bar.

title: Verify unsuccessful login with invalid username
preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page
test_steps: Enter invalid username: invaliduser | Enter valid password: admin123 | Click the Login button
expected_result: Error message is displayed, and user is not redirected to the dashboard.

title: Verify unsuccessful login with invalid password
preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page
test_steps: Enter valid username: Admin | Enter invalid password: wrongpassword | Click the Login button
expected_result: Error message is displayed, and user is not redirected to the dashboard.

title: Verify unsuccessful login with empty username
preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page
test_steps: Leave username field empty | Enter valid password: admin123 | Click the Login button
expected_result: Error message is displayed, and user is not redirected to the dashboard.

title: Verify unsuccessful login with empty password
preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page
test_steps: Enter valid username: Admin | Leave password field empty | Click the Login button
expected_result: Error message is displayed, and user is not redirected to the dashboard.

preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page

title: Verify login fails with invalid username
preconditions: User is on the OrangeHRM login page
test_steps: Enter invalid username: invaliduser | Enter valid password: admin123 | Click the Login button
expected_result: Login fails, error message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed, and user remains on the login page.
